# services.routinator

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.routinator`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.routinator.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Routinator 3000. |
| `services.routinator.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments passed to routinator, see <https://routinator.docs.nlnetlabs.nl/en/stable/manual-page.html#options> for options."; |
| `services.routinator.extraServerArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments passed to the server subcommand, see <https://routinator.docs.nlnetlabs.nl/en/stable/manual-page.html#subcmd-server> for options."; |
| `services.routinator.package` | `package` | The routinator package to use. |
| `services.routinator.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Configuration for Routinator 3000, see <https://routinator.docs.nlnetlabs.nl/en/stable/manual-page.html#configuration-file> for options. |
| `services.routinator.settings.expire` | `null or signed integer` | An integer value specifying the number of seconds an RTR client is requested to use a data set if it cannot get an update before throwing it away and continuing with no data at all. |
| `services.routinator.settings.http-listen` | `null or (list of string)` | An array of string values each providing an address and port on which the HTTP server should listen. Address and port should be separated by a colon. IPv6 address should be enclosed in square brackets. |
| `services.routinator.settings.log` | `null or one of "default", "stderr", "syslog", "file"` | A string specifying where to send log messages to. See, <https://routinator.docs.nlnetlabs.nl/en/stable/manual-page.html#term-log> |
| `services.routinator.settings.log-file` | `null or absolute path` | A string value containing the path to a file to which log messages will be appended if the log configuration value is set to file. In this case, the value is mandatory. |
| `services.routinator.settings.log-level` | `null or one of "error", "warn", "info", "debug"` | A string value specifying the maximum log level for which log messages should be emitted. See, <https://routinator.docs.nlnetlabs.nl/en/stable/manual-page.html#logging> |
| `services.routinator.settings.refresh` | `null or signed integer` | An integer value specifying the number of seconds Routinator should wait between consecutive validation runs in server mode. The next validation run will happen earlier, if objects expire earlier. |
| `services.routinator.settings.repository-dir` | `absolute path` | The path where the collected RPKI data is stored. |
| `services.routinator.settings.retry` | `null or signed integer` | An integer value specifying the number of seconds an RTR client is requested to wait after it failed to receive a data set. |
| `services.routinator.settings.rtr-listen` | `null or (list of string)` | An array of string values each providing an address and port on which the RTR server should listen in TCP mode. Address and port should be separated by a colon. IPv6 address should be enclosed in square brackets. |
